notes: It didn't start the first few times I tried, but worked every time after reinstalling. It starts in windowed mode. Pressing Alt + Enter enters fullscreen. I also got the graphical glitch previously mentioned, but if I close it and open again it opens in fullscreen the next time without the glitch. It crashed a few times when switching between windowed and fullscreen, so I recommend using ScummVM instead.
title: The Dig®
